channel.title: Forecasting on Nigel Green | Strategic Finance & Business Architecture
channel.description: Recent content in Forecasting on Nigel Green | Strategic Finance & Business Architecture

item.title: Kantar — Executive Director
item.description: Led CX domain for Kantar NZ. Advised banks on pricing strategy, built forecasts for FinTech and start-ups, won VoC programmes, and trained teams across NZ and SE Asia.

item.title: TNS / Conversa Global — Director
item.description: 10+ years spanning management consultancy and market research across 80+ countries. Built models for Nigeria’s largest telco, Vietnam’s cement champion, and global wine brands.

item.title: Carter Holt Harvey — Strategy Analyst
item.description: Convinced management to cut forest harvesting by a third for long-term value. Built Asia-Pacific log price forecasting models for NZ’s largest forest owner.

item.title: The Treasury (NZ) — Senior Analyst
item.description: Advised the Minister of Finance on $400M+ health spending. Drove the recognition of ACC’s $7B+ unfunded liabilities. Authored the official Economic Forecast chapter.
